hooks.command: PROJ=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null) && E2E="$PROJ/tests/e2e" && [ -d "$E2E/node_modules" ] && docker compose ps --status running 2>/dev/null | grep -q web && cd "$E2E" && npx playwright test --reporter=line 2>&1 && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"E2E tests all passed"}}' || echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"E2E tests skipped (environment not ready)"}}'
